name: Lion King Animal
desc: The king of the jungle, representing strength and majesty. Perfect for content about leadership, safari travel, and big cat conservation.

name: Elephant Safari Animal
desc: A symbol of wisdom and memory. High SEO value for ethical animal tourism, African wildlife, and environmental protection posts.

name: Panda Bear Animal
desc: The universal icon for endangered species. Ideal for conservation awareness, cute animal videos, and Asian wildlife topics.

name: Giraffe Tall Animal
desc: Represents unique beauty and perspective. Great for zoo updates, children's educational content, and savanna-themed designs.

name: Dog Pet Animal
desc: The quintessential 'man's best friend.' Targeted at pet care, adoption agencies, and dog-friendly lifestyle blogs.

name: Cat Domestic Animal
desc: The internet's favorite companion. Essential for viral cat memes, pet supply stores, and home life content.

name: Horse Racing Animal
desc: Symbolizes speed, freedom, and the equestrian lifestyle. Used for farm life, sports betting, and ranching topics.

name: Whale Marine Animal
desc: The giant of the deep sea. Perfect for whale watching tours, marine biology, and ocean plastic awareness.

name: Monkey Jungle Animal
desc: Represents playfulness and primate intelligence. Used for lighthearted humor, tropical forest topics, and evolutionary science.

name: Tiger Jungle Animal
desc: A powerful symbol of grace and ferocity. Often used in sports branding, Asian cultural content, and tiger conservation efforts.

name: Fox Clever Animal
desc: Represents wit and cunning. Ideal for autumn-themed posts, woodland animal graphics, and tech/startup branding.

name: Penguin Antarctic Animal
desc: The symbol for cold climates and flightless birds. Perfect for climate change discussions, winter themes, and cute wildlife content.
